data.title: Mobile: show flanking house pennants side-by-side before footer

data.body:
Cold review of 83b6f17. PASS.

Verified all 6 acceptance criteria:
(a) All 5 pages have flex md:hidden items-end justify-center gap-3 px-3 pt-8 pb-12 block with two w-[48%] aspect-[123/368] wrappers using correct per-page component (Events->EventsBannerSVG, Visit->VisitBannerSVG, Education->EducationBannerSVG, Campus->CampusBannerSVG, Lab->PublicationsBannerSVG).
(b) Block sits at same nesting level as <Footer/> inside the relative z-10 wrapper -> normal document flow, not inside the absolute pennant layer. Correct.
(c) New block md:hidden; all desktop layers remain hidden md:flex. Desktop unaffected.
(d) CampusPage desktop layer changed flex -> hidden md:flex, and ONLY that token on that line.
(e) No *BannerSVG component files modified; exactly one banner import per page (no dupes).
(f) Banner img is 'block h-full w-full'; aspect-[123/368] on w-[48%] parent yields intrinsic non-zero height -> no 0-height collapse. Technical approach sound.

Overflow: flex items get 48% of content box (375-24px padding=351px), 2x(48% of 351)+12px gap=349<=351. No horizontal overflow. items-end + identical 123:368 aspect on both children -> no misalignment. aria-hidden appropriate (decorative duplicate of desktop).

npx tsc --noEmit -> exit 0. npm run build -> exit 0 (built in 4.07s). No inline fixes needed.

VERDICT: PASS
